data.title: Add enforcement boundary headers to 6 hooks and implement annotation-driven pre-commit check
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Add '# hook-boundary: enforcement' headers to 6 enforcement hook files, and create a new pre-commit check script that detects when an enforcement-annotated file sources hook-error-handler.sh.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/review-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/review-integrity-guard.sh |

## Implementation

### Enforcement headers
In each of the 6 files, add as the second line (after #!/usr/bin/env bash):
  # hook-boundary: enforcement

### pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check.sh
Annotation-driven check (no hardcoded file list):
1. Get list of staged files: git diff --cached --name-only
2. For each staged file, check if it contains '# hook-boundary: enforcement'
3. If yes, check if the same file also contains a 'source' call to 'hook-error-handler.sh'
4. If both conditions true: print error message + exit 1
5. Otherwise: exit 0

Register in: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-hooks.conf (or equivalent registration file — check how other pre-commit checks are registered)

### Post-install
chmod +x the new check script.

## Depends On
- 22c9-2cc0 (RED test must exist before implementation)
